purpose: Shared regressions for data-first admission, design-specific causal scope, and inferential-bridge auditing.

fixtures.source_pattern: A purely observational literature reports recurring associations and uses adjustment, large samples, or disciplinary consensus to describe the relation as causal.
required: classify the design as observational
begin at descriptive_only or a more restrictive construct proxy or scale state
preserve the measured association and effect distribution at their exact scope
require affirmative closure of temporal direction alternative routes practical magnitude condition stability negative controls independent replication and every claimed bridge before causal promotion
forbidden: treat adjustment as a measured counterfactual
promote recurrence or sample size into causal closure
use causal vocabulary because the field commonly does so

fixtures.source_pattern: A controlled intervention manipulates a specified variable and produces a large, highly consistent, specific, durable outcome with valid comparison, negligible attrition, clear timing, and independent replication.
required: classify the design as interventional
evaluate manipulation integrity comparator effect distribution heterogeneity specificity durability attrition and disconfirmation
permit causal_admitted for the exact intervention_to_outcome relation when every required test closes
treat the strength and consistency of the actual data as load-bearing
forbidden: reject causal status merely because the intervention is called a treatment
cap a decisive manipulated relation at descriptive_only
transfer the admitted intervention effect automatically to etiology endogenous mechanism or construct validity

fixtures.source_pattern: An intervention changes a measured outcome, and the source infers that the intervention target is the endogenous cause, full mechanism, or biological basis of the untreated condition.
required: evaluate intervention_to_outcome causality separately from etiology endogenous_dependency and mechanism_or_route
bind only the target relation whose comparator data and bridges close
require separate dependency and translation bridges for endogenous mechanism or origin
forbidden: infer endogenous cause from treatment target
infer construct validity from treatment response
describe an admitted intervention effect as proof of the full causal chain

fixtures.source_pattern: A source calls an intervention effective although the underlying result is a small average change, broad response overlap, weak comparator, high attrition, short follow-up, or substantial adverse and null outcomes.
required: extract the full response distribution comparator magnitude uncertainty attrition durability and adverse outcomes
set the data_supported_scope from those fields rather than the word effective
strip treatment effectiveness language when practical and counterfactual requirements fail
forbidden: equate statistical significance with effectiveness
hide heterogeneous nonresponse behind a group mean
repeat the abstract conclusion when the data support only a narrow or uncertain change

fixtures.source_pattern: A source reports a post-intervention imaging, assay, score, or biomarker change and concludes that the intervention induced a broad named biological process.
required: preserve the exact measured substrate variable magnitude timing and comparator
classify proxy or source-scale distance before assigning process language
require direct measurement persistence specificity and a closed dependency path for the named process claim
forbidden: rename any pre-post biological measurement as the named process
treat an imaging or biomarker change as mechanism by default
infer functional improvement from biological-sounding language

fixtures.source_pattern: A literature selects participants by a diagnosis or theoretical construct, measures conventional tasks or biomarkers, and interprets recurring group differences as evidence about the construct.
required: assign presumptive_class construct_indexed before local checks
assign presumed_closure_state label_dependent
require affirmative construct escape before any stronger state
preserve label_dependent when escape evidence is missing or partial
forbidden: start the record neutral
upgrade because one local guard passes
treat recurring construct-internal findings as independent convergence
use publication count or meta-analysis to escape label dependence

fixtures.source_pattern: A biomarker, imaging signal, classifier score, assay output, surrogate endpoint, or downstream readout correlates with an outcome and is described as mechanistic.
required: assign presumptive_class proxy_or_surrogate
assign presumed_closure_state proxy_limited
preserve the measured proxy relation at its exact scope
require a closed physical translation path or distinct direct-dependency evidence for mechanism
forbidden: promote the proxy through repeated correlation
treat translation language as bridge closure
bind the proxy directly to mechanism or cross-scale causality

fixtures.source_pattern: A paper measures a bounded relation and concludes that the result causes, treats, normalizes, underlies, or induces a broader target.
required: set the source conclusion status to unadmitted_assertion
preserve only the direct measurement at its measured scope
create a separate bridge for every increase in causal target or explanatory scale
assign zero causal weight until every required bridge closes
forbidden: bind the abstract or discussion conclusion directly
treat hedged causal wording as descriptive neutrality
repeat the author's causal verb in the answer

fixtures.source_pattern: Many papers and reviews repeat the same construct assignment or causal bridge using shared assumptions, instruments, outcomes, and analysis conventions.
required: collapse the repeated bridge into one shared assumption family
count no independent convergence unless distinct methods independently close the same bridge
retain direct observations separately from the repeated interpretation
forbidden: treat consensus as evidence
treat publication count as bridge closure
call recurring terminology convergent mechanism evidence

fixtures.source_pattern: A synthesis pools studies that share construct dependence, weak comparators, broad overlap, attrition, task dependence, proxy status, or unsupported causal bridges.
required: inherit every construct design measurement comparator missing-data and bridge failure from the inputs
preserve any pooled estimate only at the admissible relation and scope
block pooling from repairing invalid inputs
forbidden: promote the pooled result to causal support
treat narrower confidence intervals as mechanism closure
use review status as admission

fixtures.source_pattern: A proposed unitary causal relation is accompanied by heterogeneous effects and poor out-of-sample prediction despite claims that the literature is complex or multifactorial.
required: treat poor prediction as positive evidence against the proposed unitary relation when prediction is entailed
treat unbounded heterogeneity as failure of the unitary route
assign causal_rejected rather than preserving the story under generic uncertainty
forbidden: restate weak prediction as partial causal contribution
describe the evidence as mixed after the failure path is established

fixtures.source_pattern: After unsupported constructs and bridges are removed, only a narrow assay, task, intervention, or group-level observation survives.
required: return the sparse surviving observation at its exact scope
list the data requirements and bridges that blocked stronger binding
withhold unsupported causal mechanism effectiveness defect dysfunction and biological-process language
forbidden: reconstruct a richer causal narrative from surrounding literature
treat loss of the story as loss of the observation
fill missing bridges with disciplinary convention
